# Security

If you believe you have found a security vulnerability in this project, please report it responsibly.

**Preferred:** open a [private security advisory](https://github.com/abbasmhd/CifraId/security/advisories/new) for this repository (GitHub **Security** tab → **Report a vulnerability**).

If you cannot use advisories, contact the maintainers via GitHub profile or open a public issue describing the issue in general terms (without exploit details) so it can be triaged.

CifraId performs **obfuscation of integer IDs**, not encryption. Do not rely on it for secrets, authentication tokens, or tamper-proof identifiers.
